reviews.comment:
La verdad los chicos que despachan combustible son de primera, pero a la hora de pedir un café no puede ser que se tarde dos hs, yo sé que no es culpa del empleado pero deja que desear el sector cafetería, realizas un pedido y las mesas están sucias, te traen el café con cara de orto y se enojan si le decís que retire la mugre de la mesa....

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, the guys who pump the gas are great, but when it comes to ordering a coffee, it's unacceptable that it takes two hours. I know it's not the employee's fault, but the coffee area leaves much to be desired. You place an order and the tables are dirty, they bring you the coffee with a sour face, and they get angry if you ask them to clean the table...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCeHJxNVl3EAE

Cash only

reviews.comment:
Atención Afip. Este establecimiento evade impuestos 100%. Sólo acepta efectivo y le pedís factura y no te la da. Dicen que no le funciona el sistema cuando en todos los demás comercios te aceptan otros medios de pago. Siendo la única gasolinera que hay en todo Valle Fértil, la Afip tendría que mandar personal hasta allí y seguirlos bien de cerca.

(Translated by Google)
Attention: Afip (National Tax Administration). This establishment evades taxes completely. It only accepts cash, and if you ask for a receipt, it won't give you one. They say their system isn't working, even though every other store accepts other forms of payment. Since this is the only gas station in the entire Valle Fértil, Afip should send personnel there and monitor them closely.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8700140572418264453/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCbV9uRWp3RRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Los playeros muy atentos y serviciales, les comenté la ruta que iba a hacer y me ayudaron a corregirla y evitar tanto rutas complicadas como también a ahorrar tiempo.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants were very attentive and helpful. I told them the route I was going to take, and they helped me correct it, avoiding both complicated routes and saving time.
